title: Organisational Structure
seoDescription: How the Centre for Plant Medicine Research is organised — governing oversight, executive leadership, research departments, services, and corporate functions.
lede: CPMR connects governing oversight, executive leadership, and departmental delivery so research, services, and administration work as one national institution.

diagram.alt: Overview diagram: Governing Board oversees the Director; research departments, service units, corporate administration, and support functions report through executive leadership.
diagram.caption: High-level organisational chart — illustrative structure pending final verified chart from governance.

linearisedOutline.heading: Structure outline (text version)
linearisedOutline.intro: The following outline follows the diagram top to bottom and left to right for screen readers and users who prefer a text hierarchy.

nodes.label: Governing Board
nodes.note: Strategic oversight and accountability to stakeholders

children.label: Research departments
children.note: Scientific programmes, laboratories, and field research

children.label: Department mini-sites
children.note: Structured public sections per research department

children.label: Service units
children.note: Clinic, Drug Analysis Unit, and related public services

children.label: Governance and policy
children.note: Board secretariat, compliance, and planning support

children.label: Support functions
children.note: Finance, human resources, ICT, and facilities

children.label: Shared services
children.note: Enabling functions for research and service delivery
